TextRun.Text: sth. for sb.=provide sb. with sth.
sth. to/for sb. =supply sb. with sth.

RichText.Text: 1. face challenges regarding water safety 2. achieve initial success succeed in doing sth. be successful in doing sth. finish the task successfully 3. thank sb. for doing sth. 4. make contributions to doing sth. a contributor to... contribute v. 5. a rainy season 6. be short of water 7. last for several months 8. remain an unsolved issue 9. provide sth. for sb.=provide sb. with sth. supply sth. to/for sb. =supply sb. with sth. 10. explore ways to supply clean water for people 11. hold a series of sustainable development meetings 12. it is hoped that...

TextRun.Text: 10. 探索为人们提供清洁用水的途径

RichText.Text: 1. 面临关于水资源安全方面的挑战 2. 取得初步的/最初的成功 成功做某事 成功做成某事 顺利地完成任务 3. 感谢某人做了某事 4. 为做某事做出贡献 是……的贡献者 捐献，做贡献，投稿，促进 5. 雨季 6. 缺乏水 7. 持续数月 8. 仍是一个未解决的问题 9. 为某人提供某物 为某人提供某物 10. 探索为人们提供清洁用水的途径 11. 举办一系列可持续发展会议 12. 希望……
